SOURCE 1: TRACY SHARP - FIRED → COACHING (ITALY)
Rating: 9.5/10 ★★★★★ [FLAGSHIP STORY - DEEPEST EMOTIONAL JOURNEY]

URL: https://www.sharpminds.coach/post/how-i-reframed-my-biggest-life-failure
Date: February 23, 2022 (Updated September 15, 2022)
Word Count: ~1,400 words

---NARRATIVE ARC---

BEFORE: Career climber, manager prioritizing team mental health, working way through ranks with "energy, sacrifice, time"

TRIGGER: Monday 2021 - suspended from work, escorted from premises → 2 weeks later: FIRED
- Career was "#1 priority"
- Never been fired before
- "I. Had. Failed."

CRISIS (3 MONTHS): 
- "F*cking furious" / "Utterly ashamed"
- Complete routine loss: eating/sleeping at strange times
- Didn't want to get out of bed
- SUICIDAL IDEATION: "felt like maybe it would be better if I wasn't around anymore"
- "Couldn't see a way out of the darkness"
- "Felt completely lost - didn't know who I was or who I wanted to be"
- Pulled away from friends (shame: "scared they'd say I deserved it, 'that's what you get when you're a show-off'")
- "Woman down, bloodied and bruised, not able to pick myself back up again"
- ALONE IN FOREIGN COUNTRY: hadn't built friendship network

TURNING POINT: Found counselor Camila (studying to be coach while running counseling business)
- Session 1: "Just because you feel like you don't want to be around right now doesn't mean you want to die. It means there has to be part of you that has to go, because it is no longer serving you."
- Removed "every part of the armour": job, home, ego, friends, sense of self
- "Peeled away each part piece by piece only to rebuild it in new form"

BREAKTHROUGH REALIZATIONS:
- "How do you feel about your failure?" - Felt like child in sin bin, didn't know rules, felt rejected
- "I couldn't separate my actions from my sense of self"
- "When you failed, what were you BEING?" - Being caring boss, professional team player, good listener, kind person → NOT A FAILURE
- ACTUAL failure: couldn't deliver difficult project on time (lacked experience, values/personality didn't fit company)

RELATIONSHIP PIVOT:
- Toxic boyfriend: "told me it was all my fault, had no means to support me emotionally" → ENDED relationship
- New boyfriend (found "straight away"): "If it wasn't for your failure, we would never have met"

AFTER:
- Career: COACHING (naturally skilled, brings experience/personality together)
- Geography: Chose ITALY over UK/Europe
- Mindset: "My failure made me rethink my position on work" / "Reassess relationship with work and mental health"
- Reframe: "This is not a failure. This is a blessing and for it I am truly grateful."
- Anchor: "I am still writing my story when I am the main character for my failure"

---EMOTIONAL BEATS (20+)---
1. Monday suspension, escorted out (public humiliation)
2. "F*cking furious"
3. "I. Had. Failed." (triple emphasis)
4. 3-month dark cloud
5. Eating/sleeping disorder
6. Don't want to get out of bed
7. Suicidal ideation ("better if I wasn't around")
8. No way out of darkness
9. Complete identity loss
10. Pulled away from friends
11. Shame: "show-off" fear
12. "Woman down, bloodied and bruised"
13. Alone in foreign country
14. Found Camila
15. Camila's wisdom: "part of you has to go"
16. Armor removal: job, home, ego, friends, self
17. Child in sin bin metaphor
18. Couldn't separate actions from self
19. "What were you BEING?" breakthrough
20. Toxic boyfriend blamed her
21. Dumped him, found new boyfriend
22. Boyfriend: "If it wasn't for your failure, we would never have met"
23. Italy decision
24. "This is not a failure. This is a blessing."

---ESL RESONANCE MULTIPLIERS: 6/6---
✓ Overcoming "Not Good Enough" (CORE THEME - couldn't separate failure from self-worth)
✓ Building New Life (foreign country, new career, coaching)
✓ Persistence (3-month darkness, kept going)
✓ First-Time Courage (therapy, ending relationship, career pivot)
✓ Belonging (isolation → finding community through coaching)
✓ Connection Across Differences (new relationship, Camila mentorship)

---STORY POWER---
DARKEST EMOTIONAL ARC FOUND: Suicidal ideation, foreign country isolation, complete identity destruction
THERAPEUTIC JOURNEY: Actual dialogue with counselor Camila, breakthrough moments
RELATIONSHIP ARC: Toxic → supportive, adds dimension
GEOGRAPHIC REINVENTION: Italy choice meaningful
QUOTABLE GOLD: "I. Had. Failed." / Camila's wisdom / "Woman down, bloodied and bruised" / "This is a blessing"
